arts.ttl: Real Madrid fire ominous Arsenal warning as official club account sends message
arts.sum: The reigning Champions League holders are looking to complete another famous evening at the Bernabeu and deny Arsenal a place in the final four. Real Madrid have posted an ominous warning as they look to overcome their three-goal deficit against Arsenal in the Champions League on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Ollie Watkins transfer green light after failed January bid
arts.sum: In their search for a striker during the January transfer window, the Gunners saw a £40 million bid rejected by Aston Villa . Arsenal may have been handed a potential transfer green light to make another move for Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins in the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: 11 players to miss Real Madrid vs Arsenal as Mikel Arteta confirms double injury boost
arts.sum: Arsenal visit Real Madrid for the second leg of their Champions League quarter-final on Wednesday and both Mikel Arteta and Carlo Ancelotti have depleted squads

arts.ttl: Arsenal rival Liverpool & Chelsea for €45m wonderkid who would “like” PL transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly among the clubs pursuing a potential summer transfer window move for Club Brugge’s talented young defender Joel Ordonez. The highly-rated 20-year-old is also attracting interest from major Premier League clubs like Chelsea and Liverpool, according to Just Arsenal. The report claims that the Gunners have had their scouts watch the €45m-rated Ordonez […] The post Arsenal rival Liverpool & Chelsea for €45m wonderkid who would “like” PL transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal should trade Oleksandar Zinchenko to sign £50m Champions League attacker this summer - opinion
arts.sum: In the past, Arsenal have shown a willingness to execute swap deals, even with their biggest rivals. Back in 2018, Arsene Wenger oversaw a switch...

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Newcastle United star on radar ahead of summer window?
arts.sum: Arsenal are allegedly giving consideration to making an approach for one of Newcastle United's star players during the summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid send ominous warning to Arsenal as UEFA grant special request for Champions League clash
arts.sum: The holders require another special night to reach the Champions League semi-final

arts.ttl: Richard Keys Gives Arteta Controversial Advice Ahead of Real Madrid v Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal have given themselves a huge boost in terms of Champions League semi-final hopes but Richard Keys still believes they must do the dark arts

arts.ttl: Manchester United plan to ‘hijack’ Arsenal transfer bid
arts.sum: Manchester United are planning to hijack Arsenal’s bid to sign Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia. The unconvincing performances of Andre Onana and Altay Bayindir have persuaded Manchester United to assess the market for potential goalkeepers this summer. Onana was dropped for Sunday’s 4-1 defeat at Newcastle after two errors in the draw at Lyon last week. arts.ttl: Real Madrid expected team vs Arsenal with no Modric in triple Ancelotti change
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti is expected to switch things about as he looks to mastermind yet another Real Madrid Champions League comeback. Real Madrid predicted team vs Arsenal: Courtois; Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Garcia; Valverde, Tchouameni; Rodrygo, Bellingham, Vinicius Jr; Mbappe.
